description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in a smooth, medium-brown leather or leather-like material. The sofa features two large, rectangular seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be well-padded and uniform in size. The armrests are straight, broad, and padded, extending at the same height as the backrest for a boxy, contemporary silhouette. The sofa sits on four short, dark legs that are only slightly visible, giving it a low-profile appearance. The upholstery is solid in color with a subtle sheen, and the overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden or metal frame beneath the cushioning. This piece would be suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern, boxy two-seater sofa with smooth brown leather upholstery, straight padded armrests, and matching seat and back cushions. The design is sleek and contemporary, with a low profile and solid color finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat and back cushions, straight padded armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the sofa's low-profile legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, smooth backrest and the sofa's rectangular silhouette.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the armrest and the sofa's overall depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all loose and rectangular, arranged side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, broad, and padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, contemporary profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, dark legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible, likely block or recessed style, possibly wood or metal.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with two large, loose back cushions and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown color with a smooth, slightly glossy leather texture and no visible pattern or decorative stitching.
